label: Flow matching & transport objectives

node.label: Flow matching & transport objectives
node.definition: A vector field is learned to transport samples from a simple base distribution to data along probability paths.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Flow matching & transport objectives is to connect Generative modeling, Differential equations to downstream capabilities including Continuous normalizing flows & learned vector fields, Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models.
examples: substrate for Continuous normalizing flows & learned vector fields
substrate for Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Differential equations.

dependencies.rationale: Flow matching & transport objectives uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Flow matching & transport objectives uses Differential equations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Flow matching & transport objectives uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Flow matching & transport objectives uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: A vector field is learned to transport samples from a simple base distribution to data along probability paths.

The role of Flow matching & transport objectives is to connect Generative modeling, Differential equations to downstream capabilities including Continuous normalizing flows & learned vector fields, Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models.
